name: the-ultimate-workflow-guidelines
description: Plan-first, test-first workflow + bootstrap flow for new projects. Principles derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls. Two skills: one for daily feature work inside an existing codebase (the-ultimate-workflow-guidelines), one for greenfield project kickoff (project-bootstrap-guidelines). Ships Cursor rules under rules/ and Agent Skills under skills/.
